text: A small child is hiding on a shelf of a computer desk.
A cell phone sitting atop a beverage with a laptop on the side.
This stop sign has two street signs located above it.
A living room filled with furniture and wood floors.
An old floor standing tv next to a leather couch.
A boy eating cake and ice cream with fruit.
Some very pretty giraffes in a grassy field.
Two small square plates with food on them.
A blue sign that has arrows on it.
A toilet with a Read Until You're Wiped Trophy in front of it.
